description: According to former U.S. President Donald Trump, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court ruled that the 2020 presidential election was “rigged.”

name: The body of a five-month-old Palestinian baby killed in the Israel-Hamas war was actually a silicone doll
description: The body of a five-month-old Palestinian baby killed in the Israel-Hamas war was a silicone doll, not a real baby.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: NASA confirmed that COVID-19 vaccine recipients are no longer human
description: Research published by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration’s (NASA) Langley Research Center confirmed that people who received COVID-19 vaccines are genetically modified and no longer considered human, but rather a new species called “Homo Borg Genesis.”

name: The U.S. and the Philippines destroyed a Chinese coast guard ship in the South China Sea
description: The navies of the U.S. and the Philippines jointly destroyed a Chinese coast guard ship in the South China Sea in 2024, escalating regional tensions.
category: Violence and Conflict,Politics,Armed Conflict and War

name: NATO will send the Ukrainian Azov and Kraken battalions to suppress the French protests
description: The North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) announced on its website that it would send Ukrainian forces from the Azov and Kraken battalions to quell violent French protests.

name: Ukraine’s military spy chief said he was 'glad to see' the Moscow concert hall attack
description: Kyrylo Budanov, chief of the Main Directorate of Intelligence of Ukraine, told an ABC News reporter he was “very glad to see" the March 22, 2024, Moscow attacks, when gunmen killed 139 people at the Crocus Hall concert venue. Budanov stated that similar events were likely to continue "deeper and deeper" inside Russia.

name: Putin ordered illegal Chinese immigrants to serve in the Russian military fighting in Ukraine.
description: Russian President Vladimir Putin ordered illegal Chinese immigrants to fight for Russia in its war against Ukraine. As a result, large numbers of Chinese immigrants fled Russia in January 2024.
category: Violence and Conflict,Immigration,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Politics

name: France announced internet restrictions in July 2023 after riots over the police killing of a teenager.
description: The French Ministry of the Interior published a press release on July 2, 2023, announcing temporary restrictions on internet access in certain areas of France after violent riots over the police killing of teenager Nahel Merzouk in Nanterre, France.

name: The CDC said COVID-19 virus variant BA.2.86, or Pirola, is more contagious among vaccinated people.
description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) said in an Aug. 23, 2023, risk assessment document that COVID-19 variant BA.2.86, or Pirola, is more contagious among the vaccinated than the unvaccinated.

name: The United States conducted HIV experiments on Ukrainian soldiers
description: Since 2019, United States scientists have performed HIV experiments on Ukrainian soldiers, prisoners, and drug addicts in American laboratories located in Ukraine.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Health,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A van at the scene of the Moscow concert hall attack had a Ukrainian license plate
description: A white van at the scene of Crocus City concert hall attack in Moscow on March 22, 2024, which was used by the four suspected terrorists to arrive and flee in, carried a Ukrainian license plate.

name: A video shows a May 2024 assassination attempt on Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman
description: A video showing two cars on fire depicts a failed assassination attempt on Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman. Some of his guards were killed in the attempt.

name: The pizza restaurant that Russia struck in Kramatorsk was a military target
description: Russia did not target civilians in its June 27, 2023, missile strike on a pizzeria in the Ukrainian city of Kramatorsk. The pizzeria was a military command post hosting “NATO mercenaries” and members of the Ukrainian Armed Forces.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Colorado Supreme Court Justice Monica Márquez was arrested for treason in December 2023
description: The U.S. Marines arrested Colorado Supreme Court Justice Monica Márquez, on the grounds that she committed treason. The move was in response to a Colorado Supreme Court ruling removing former President Donald Trump from the 2024 Colorado GOP presidential primary ballot.
category: Elections,Jan. 6 Capitol attack,Violence and Conflict,Civil Unrest,Politics

name: A photo shows Atlético Madrid fans waving a giant Palestinian flag
description: A photo shows fans of the Spanish soccer team Atlético Madrid waving a giant Palestinian flag at a match.

name: MSNBC reported that Ukrainian officials profited by paying actors to visit Volodymyr Zelensky
description: An MSNBC news report said that the office of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky paid Hollywood stars including actor Danny Trejo to visit Zelensky in Kyiv as part of a public relations campaign. The celebrities were paid less than the amounts officially reported in contracts, with the difference pocketed by Zelensky’s office.

name: The Israeli government used artificial intelligence to generate an image of a child killed by Hamas
description: A photo published by the Israeli government on X (formerly known as Twitter) in October 2023, purportedly showing the charred remains of a baby killed by Palestinian militant group Hamas, was created using artificial intelligence (AI). The original photo showed a puppy, not a baby.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation,Israel-Hamas War

name: A video shows Palestinians staging a child’s death under rubble
description: A video shows the staging of a child’s supposed death under rubble to fake the impact of the Israel-Hamas war on Palestinians in Gaza.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Ukraine's International Legion posted ads at U.S. universities to recruit students
description: A poster on a notice board at a U.S. university shows that the Ukrainian International Legion, a volunteer unit of foreign fighters in Ukraine, is recruiting U.S. students to fight against Russia.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Israeli refugees were permanently resettled in Dagestan
description: In October 2023, Israeli refugees were temporarily or permanently resettled in Russia’s Dagestan region. The refugees were transported by Russian regional airline Red Wings flights between Tel Aviv and Makhachkala.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Videos show a crisis actor pretending to be a Gazan victim of Israeli violence
description: Two videos of the same Gazan man, one showing him in the hospital and another showing him completely healthy, prove that he is a crisis actor.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Houthi attacks on Red Sea shipping only target Israeli-affiliated vessels
description: Yemen’s Iranian-backed Houthi rebels only attack commercial ships in the Red Sea that are either owned or operated by Israel, or bound there, in a show of solidarity with Palestinians. The Houthis have not targeted any vessels that are not traveling to or from Israel, or that are not owned by Israeli companies.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Mossad labeled the U.S. Air Force an enemy to the state of Israel
description: Mossad labeled the U.S. Air Force an enemy to the state of Israel after a member of the U.S. Air Force set himself on fire as a protest outside the Israel embassy in Washington, D.C., on Feb. 25, 2024.

name: Iran’s strikes on Israel killed at least 44 Mossad officers
description: Iran’s April 13, 2024, missile and drone attack on Israel killed at least 44 Mossad officers at the Israeli Defense Forces’ (IDF) Nevatim air force base in southern Israel, while 18 others were seriously injured.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: An image shows Iranian military vehicles transporting heavy weapons into Syria
description: An April 2024 image shows Iranian trucks with weapons crossing the border from Iraq to Syria, in response to Israel’s April 1, 2024, attack on Iran’s consulate in Damascus, Syria. This is evidence that Iran is getting ready to escalate tensions with Israel.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: The U.S. is recruiting members of Mexican and Colombian drug cartels to fight in Ukraine
description: U.S. government agencies are recruiting Mexican and Colombian drug cartel members imprisoned in the U.S. to fight in Ukraine against Russia in exchange for amnesty.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A video shows police brutality at a pro-Palestinian protest at a U.S. college campus
description: A video of officers beating a woman shows police brutality at a pro-Palestinian rally at a U.S. college campus in May 2024.

name: BBC News released a graphic showing how Ukrainian politicians profited from the Russia-Ukraine war
description: BBC News published a graphic that shows how Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and other Ukrainian politicians made millions of dollars by misusing funds that the U.S. and other countries sent to Ukraine during the Russia-Ukraine war.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Biden received more votes in New Hampshire primary than Trump
description: President Joe Biden received 68,000 votes in the New Hampshire presidential primary election on Jan. 23, 2024, even though he wasn't on the ballot, while former U.S. President Donald Trump received 59,000 votes.

name: French ambassador to Ukraine, Étienne de Poncins, resigned and left Kyiv in October 2022
description: After Russian missiles struck Ukraine’s capital, Kyiv, in October 2022, the French ambassador to Ukraine, Étienne de Poncins, submitted his resignation and left Kyiv to save his life. Before leaving, de Poncins said that even Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky was no longer in Kyiv.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: BBC journalist Jeremy Bowen staged footage from the frontlines in Ukraine
description: An image shows that BBC reporter Jeremy Bowen, while reporting on the Russian-Ukraine war, staged being on the frontlines of the conflict.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Iran sentenced 15,000 protesters to death
description: In November 2022, the Iranian judiciary sentenced to death 15,000 people in connection with widespread anti-government protests.

name: U.S. mercenary Rebekah Maciorowski was killed by the Russian army in Ukraine
description: Rebekah Maciorowski, a 28-year-old U.S. mercenary, was killed in November 2022 by Russian shelling in Ukraine.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A video shows Zelensky being guarded by British special forces
description: A video of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky leaving a press conference in February 2024 shows that he was escorted by British security forces. One of Zelensky’s security guards wore a patch with the letters SSPU, which stands for the Directorate of Special Operations of Great Britain.

name: A video shows a U.S. poll worker rigging ballots on live television
description: A clip from a live broadcast news segment shows a U.S. election worker rigging ballots in the 2022 midterm elections.

name: A video shows corpses of Polish fighters being brought back from Ukraine
description: A video of black body bags being dragged on the ground shows the bodies of dead Polish mercenaries being brought back from the war in Ukraine.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Russia revealed the first images of its Satan 2 nuclear missile in 2022
description: In the early days of the Ukraine war, the Russian government unveiled the first images of its previously secret nuclear missile Satan 2, which can destroy an area the size of France or Texas.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Tucker Carlson said the United States is planning an attack on Russia
description: Conservative commentator Tucker Carlson said in a video that he received classified information from CIA agents informing him that the United States was preparing an attack against Russia on March 7, 2024.

name: Google revealed uncensored satellite images of Russian military sites
description: Google Maps revealed uncensored satellite images of Russian military sites in April 2022 during the Russia-Ukraine war, to help Russia’s enemies better assess the Russian military’s capabilities.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Bernie Gores was the first American casualty of the Ukraine crisis, CNN reported
description: CNN reported that a man named Bernie Gores died in Ukraine on Feb. 23, 2022, after a mine that was planted by Russian-backed separatists exploded.

name: President Volodymyr Zelensky urged Ukrainians to surrender to Russia
description: In March 2022, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky asked Ukrainians to surrender to Russia in a video broadcast on TV channel Ukraine 24.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Ousted Niger president Mohamed Bazoum was released by the junta after signing his resignation letter
description: The overthrown president of Niger, Mohamed Bazoum, has been released by the ruling military junta after signing his resignation letter. He was observed departing from the presidential villa in August 2023.

name: France 24 TV reported that French President Emmanuel Macron canceled his February 2024 trip to Kyiv because Ukrainian intelligence was plotting to assassinate him
description: A Feb. 14, 2024, France 24 TV broadcast said that French President Emmanuel Macron canceled a planned trip to Kyiv, after receiving information that Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky was planning to assassinate him.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A Ukrainian refugee tried to set fire to a genetics testing lab in California
description: Al Jazeera reported that a Ukrainian refugee, Alexey Shinkarenko, tried to set fire to a genetics testing lab in California belonging to genomics and biotechnology company 23andMe. The arson attempt came after Shinkarenko was “enraged” by a 23andMe DNA test which revealed that he is 7.9% Ukrainian, 42.4% Polish, 6.6% Russian, and 43.1% “other European nationalities.” Shinkarenko was arrested and faces a prison sentence.

name: Politico reported that 20 million Ukrainian lives would need to be sacrificed to win the war
description: Politico published an article titled "20 000 000 lives for the sake of freedom,” which said that 20 million Ukrainian soldiers would need to die for Ukraine to retake territory occupied by Russia.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A photo shows former UK prime minister Boris Johnson making a Nazi salute in Ukraine
description: A photo shows former UK prime minister Boris Johnson and two other people making Nazi salutes at the University of Lviv in western Ukraine, where Johnson traveled in September 2023 to receive an honorary doctorate.

name: Phone operator Kyivstar revealed 400,000 Ukrainian soldiers have died in the war against Russia
description: Ukrainian phone operator Kyivstar revealed  in a video charity campaign that 400,000 Ukrainian soldiers died in the war against Russia
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: A video shows a U.S. State Department spokesperson saying the Russian city of Belgorod has ‘essentially no civilians’
description: A video shows U.S. State Department Spokesperson Matthew Miller stating in a May 2024 State Department press briefing that the Russian city of Belgorod has “essentially no civilians remaining. It’s practically full of military targets at this point.”
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A video shows people staging war footage of Ukrainian troops in combat operations
description: A video shows evidence of Ukrainian soldiers staging combat footage during the Russia-Ukraine war. Soldiers are seen dragging a wounded soldier to safety, while a person in a high-visibility vest, carrying a video camera, walks past.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: A gas leak at a Kentucky polling center rigged the election in Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear's favor
description: Brief closings at Kentucky polling centers on Nov. 7, 2023, caused by a gas leak, rigged the election in Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear’s favor.

name: An image shows a refugee camp for Israelis displaced internally by the Israel-Hamas War
description: An October 2023 photo shows a refugee camp for Israelis displaced by the Israel-Hamas war, near the southern Israeli coastal city of Eilat. The image shows dozens of tents in the blue and white colors of the Israeli flag, one with a star of David on its side. A crowd of people is seen queuing, with the sea and a large Israeli flag in the background.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: An image shows a man carrying children out of rubble in Gaza
description: An image shows a man carrying five children out of rubble in Gaza
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: A video shows Gazans faking injuries during Israeli attacks
description: A video shows Gazans faking injuries during Israeli attacks in May 2024.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Videos depict the Commander-in-Chief of the Ukrainian Armed Forces ordering the military to seize power
description: Videos shared online in November 2023 show the Commander-in-Chief of the Ukrainian Armed Forces Valerii Zaluzhny calling on the military to mutiny against Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky and for Ukrainians to protest in the street.

name: A video shows Palestinians celebrating outside the Al-Aqsa Mosque in the West Bank after Iran's April 2024 attack on Israel.
description: A video shows Palestinians celebrating outside the Al-Aqsa Mosque, a historic Muslim holy site located in the West Bank, after hearing about Iran's April 13, 2024, attack on Israel.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Coughing repeatedly can help people survive a heart attack
description: A person experiencing a heart attack can increase their chances of survival by coughing repeatedly and vigorously until their heart is beating normally.

name: Tucker Carlson released a video of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky being captured by Russia
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has been captured by Russia and is being transferred to the country’s Black Dolphin Prison, according to conservative commentator Tucker Carlson. An image shows Zelensky having his mugshot taken.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Videos and images show explosives detonating on Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore in March 2024
description: Videos and images show explosives detonating on Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore, causing the bridge’s March 2024 collapse.
category: Conspiracy Theory,False Flag or Staged Incident

name: Video shows Rafah residents faking casualties ahead of Israeli assault
description: A video shows Rafah residents preparing to fake injuries and casualties ahead of Israel’s May 2024 assault on Rafah.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: A video shows fraudulent voting for India’s ruling Bharatiya Janata Party in the 2024 national elections
description: A video shows people casting numerous fraudulent votes for India’s ruling right-wing Bharatiya Janata Party in India’s 2024 general election.

name: Suspect in Slovak Prime Minister’s murder attempt was spurred by Ukrainian wife
description: The wife of the man charged with the attempted murder of Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico in May 2024 is a Ukrainian refugee who pushed her husband to take revenge on Fico for his anti-Ukraine stance.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Civil Unrest,Politics,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A leaked letter reveals that 76,000 Ukrainian troops have died in the Russia-Ukraine war
description: Valerii Zaluzhnyi, the commander in chief of the Ukrainian Armed Forces, wrote in an August 2022 leaked letter that 76,000 troops have died in the war.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A video shows Ukrainian refugees attacking locals in Poland in August 2023
description: On Aug. 24, 2023, Ukraine’s Independence Day, a group of Ukrainian refugees in Poland attacked eight locals because they refused to chant a fascist slogan.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Civil Unrest,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Ukrainian postal service Ukrposhta issued a stamp honoring a Nazi veteran
description: In September 2023, Ukrposhta, the Ukrainian postal service, issued a postal stamp honoring Yaroslav Hunka, a Ukrainian-Canadian man who fought for a Nazi unit in WWII. The stamp featured Hunka's face along with Ukrainian text, reading “Yaroslavl Hunka, Hero of Ukraine.”
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Qatar threatened to halt natural gas exports if Israel does not stop striking Gaza
description: In October 2023, Qatari officials issued a warning stating that the country would cut off global gas supplies if Israel continued its attacks against Gaza.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: The Nashville Covenant School shooting was a false flag
description: Video footage of a March 27, 2023, shooting at the Covenant School in Nashville, Tennessee, shows that the shooter was wearing different shoes when entering the school than when police confronted and shot the shooter, proving the event was staged.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Mass Shootings

name: A video shows Israeli soldiers dancing in response to Iranian president’s fatal helicopter crash
description: A video shows Israeli soldiers dancing on top of a rooftop celebrating the May 2024 crash of a helicopter crash carrying Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi.

name: Leaked audio shows Chinese Foreign Minister Qin Gang saying that war between U.S. and China is inevitable
description: A leaked recording shows Chinese Foreign Minister Qin Gang saying in an internal meeting

name: Ukrainian refugees set fire to Polish warehouse in April 2024
description: Ukrainian refugees set fire to a pharmaceutical warehouse in Katowice, Poland, on April 8, 2024, in retaliation for Poland’s weak military aid to Ukraine.
category: Violence and Conflict,Civil Unrest,Politics,Armed Conflict and War,Russia-Ukraine War

name: Ukrainian refugees caused a July 2023 outbreak of Legionnaires’ disease in southeast Poland
description: Ukrainians living in a local refugee center are the confirmed source of a July 2023 outbreak of Legionnaires’ disease in the southeast Polish city of Rzeszow. Five employees who worked at the local refugee center died of the disease.
category: Health,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: A video shows Jimmy Carter saying Taiwan is a part of China
description: A video shows former U.S. President Jimmy Carter reading aloud a joint communiqué between the U.S. and China in December 1978, and stating that Taiwan is a part of China.

name: An illegal immigrant was appointed to serve on the San Francisco Elections Commission
description: An illegal immigrant was appointed to serve on the San Francisco Elections Commission to ensure other undocumented migrants can illegally vote in the 2024 U.S. elections.

name: The United Arab Emirates suspended diplomatic relations with Israel in April 2024
description: The United Arab Emirates cut off diplomatic ties with Israel in April 2024 following an Israeli strike that killed aid workers in Gaza.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Russia state-sponsored disinformation,Israel-Hamas War

name: Texas declared a state of war against the U.S. government
description: Texas Governor Greg Abbott declared a state of war against the U.S. government due to a dispute over border security measures.
category: China state-sponsored disinformation,State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War

name: An image shows U.S. troops killed in the January 2024 Iranian-linked drone attack in Jordan
description: A photo depicts three U.S. soldiers who were killed in an Iranian-linked drone strike at a U.S. base in Jordan near the Syrian border on Jan. 28, 2024.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Donald Trump denied the attacks on the World Trade Center and said 9/11 was an inside job
description: At a Jan. 22, 2024, campaign victory speech in Laconia, New Hampshire, former U.S. President Donald Trump said that “There was no attack on the towers of the World Trade Center,” and that “The 9/11 attack was the work of the United States."
category: Elections,State-Sponsored Disinformation,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Politics,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: COVID-19 vaccines killed every animal they were tested on
description: Animals used in COVID-19 vaccine trials all died within months of being injected with the vaccines, either from immune disorders, cardiac failure, or sepsis.

name: Ukrainian forces bombed a kindergarten in eastern Ukraine on Feb. 17, 2022
description: The Ukranian army bombed a kindergarten in the village of Novaya Kondrashovka, located in the Russian separatist-controlled Lugansk republic in eastern Ukraine.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A BBC news report shows that Ukrainian official Andriy Yermak paid millions to be in Time magazine
description: An April 2024 BBC video news report said that Bellingcat journalists obtained a list of people who paid to be included in Time Magazine’s 2024 ranking of the world’s most influential people. The list showed that the Chief of Staff to Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky,Andrei Yermak, paid $27 million to be included in the ranking. The BBC said that the discovery suggests that Yermak is increasing his credibility, and preparing to challenge Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky.

name: Image shows Iranian special forces raiding the Indian embassy in Iran
description: An image shows Iranian special forces raiding the Indian embassy in Tehran in May 2024, after receiving a tip that India was attempting to assassinate Iranian President Ebrahim Raisi at Israel’s behest.

name: French cosmetic companies test their products on Ukrainian refugees
description: France-based cosmetic companies including Chanel, Lancôme, L’Oreal, Vichy, Cacharel, and Garnier tested their products on 40 to 50 Ukrainian refugees. These companies saved over 30 million euros by hiring Ukrainian refugees to test their cosmetic products.
category: Business & Finance,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Companies, products and brands

name: Human Rights Watch reported that French soldiers sexually assaulted indigenous women in New Caledonia
description: A video report by the non-governmental organization Human Rights Watch says that the organization has recorded more than 23 cases of sexual assault by French soldiers against indigenous women in New Caledonia during May 2024 mass protests.

name: Israel’s top sniper, nicknamed “The Bloody Wolf,” was killed in Gaza
description: Israel’s top sniper, named Ador Cohen and known as “The Bloody Wolf,” was killed during the Israel-Hamas war in the Palestinian city of Jabalia, in May 2024
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: The Israel Defense Forces announced that 46 officers and soldiers were killed or injured on June 2, 2024
description: The Israel Defense Forces announced that 46 officers and soldiers were killed or injured on June 2, 2024, the largest number of Israeli military casualties in a single day since the start of the Israel-Hamas war last October.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: A German auction house planned to raise money for Ukraine by destroying Russian art
description: Euronews reported that the German-based auction house Bolland & Marotz planned in October 2022 to hold an auction of Russian art and antiques in support of Ukraine. Bolland & Marotz said the artwork would be publicly destroyed after the auction and proceeds from the sale would go to Ukraine’s armed forces.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Video shows Jordanians mobilizing to help Hamas fight Israel
description: Video shows thousands of Jordanians mobilizing to help Hamas fight Israel
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Donald Trump said he would get Pakistani politician Imran Khan out of jail if he wins U.S. election
description: A video shows former President Donald Trump stating that if he wins the 2024 U.S. election, he will get Pakistani politician Imran Khan out of jail.

name: Videos show Russian President Vladimir Putin warning the U.S. to stay out of the Israel-Hamas War.
description: Two videos show Russian President Vladimir Putin warning the U.S. to stay out of the Israel-Hamas War in October 2023.
category: Violence and Conflict,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Thousands of people in the UK have been killed by COVID-19 vaccines
description: Thousands of elderly patients in the UK have been killed by COVID-19 vaccines.

name: Video shows India's ruling Bharatiya Janata Party using the Indian army to get votes in 2024
description: A video shows the Indian army forcing people to vote for India's ruling right wing Bharatiya Janata Party in India’s 2024 general election.

name: An error message on a ballot scanner in Dallas is evidence of election fraud
description: During the 2024 Texas primary elections, an error message appearing on a ballot scanner in Dallas demonstrates that fraud was occurring.

name: A video shows the aftermath of a destructive Iraqi strike on Haifa airport in Israel
description: A video shows fire raging in the aftermath of a destructive Iraqi strike on a power plant at Israel’s Haifa airport in March 2024.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Politics,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Shinzo Abe was assassinated for opposing COVID-19 vaccine mandates and promoting ivermectin
description: Former Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe was assassinated because he did not mandate COVID-19 vaccines, returned 1.6 million doses, and gave Japanese citizens ivermectin to treat COVID-19.

name: Video shows abnormal blood clotting in test tube after COVID-19 vaccination
description: A video shows blood from a person vaccinated against COVID-19 clotting unnaturally fast in a test tube.

name: President Biden admitted that wildfires in Texas were caused by directed energy weapons
description: U.S. President Joe Biden admitted in a press conference that wildfires that hit Texas in February and March 2024 ere caused by direct energy weapons (DEWs), a category of weapons that includes lasers.

name: The U.S. Supreme Court voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election
description: A 2022 leaked report shows that the U.S. Supreme Court voted to overturn the 2020 presidential electiondue to election fraud. As a result, Donald Trump will be reinstated as president.

name: Reuters reported in June 2024 that Israel plans to attack Lebanon
description: In June 2024, Reuters published an article reporting that Israel plans to attack Lebanon within 48 hours.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Israel-Hamas War

name: French security forces are conducting 'massive raids' at McDonald’s locations in Paris due to terrorist attack threats
description: The French General Directorate for Internal Security released a video stating that it conducted “massive raids” at McDonald’s locations in Paris due to heightened terrorist attack threats ahead of the 2024 Olympics.

name: Forty-six U.S. states recounted votes in the 2020 presidential election and confirmed that Joe Biden lost to Donald Trump in those states
description: Joe Biden did not win the presidency after 46 states conducted recounts of their votes in the 2020 U.S. presidential election and determined that Biden actually lost to Donald Trump in those states.

Vote for Kamala Harris!” The video was uploaded to Instagram by CNN.

name: Volodymyr Zelensky purchased the German villa of Nazi propaganda minister Joseph Goebbels
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky purchased a villa that once belonged to Nazi propaganda minister Joseph Goebbels for 8 million euros. The sale of the property in the German municipality of Wandlitz is is proven by a purchase contract obtained by Sabine Mels, a former employee of state-owned German real estate company Berliner Immobilienmanagement (BIM).
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: An Egyptian journalist was murdered after exposing corruption by the Zelensky family
description: Egyptian investigative journalist Mohammed Al-Alawi was murdered in December 2023 after he revealed that Olga Kiyashko, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky’s mother-in-law, purchased a $5 million mansion in Egypt. Police said Al-Alawi died of traumatic brain injury, after being beaten to death by unidentified assailants. According to his brother, Al-Alawi was killed by “Ukrainian special forces” acting on behalf of the Ukrainian president.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Leaked audio shows U.S. officials Victoria Nuland and James O'Brien discussing Alexei Navalny's replacement
description: An audio recording leaked in February 2024 depicts two top U.S. officials — outgoing U.S. Under Secretary of State for Political Affairs Victoria Nuland and Assistant Secretary of State for European and Eurasian Affairs James O’Brien — in a private phone conversation discussing who should replace the late Russian opposition leader Alexei Navalny.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky purchased King Charles’ Highgrove estate
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky bought Highgrove House, an English countryside estate, from King Charles for 20 million pounds. The purchase was confirmed by the king’s former butler, Grant Harrold.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: France launched an advertising campaign to recruit 200,000 French people to enlist in Ukraine
description: In March 2024, the French Ministry of the Armed Forces launched a recruitment website inviting 200,000 French people to “enlist in Ukraine” for a salary of 12,000 euros per month, with immigrants being given priority for recruitment.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: Paramount Pictures is producing a $115 million film about Zelensky with his studio
description: U.S. film company Paramount Pictures is producing a new, $115 million budget film about the life of Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky. The film is a joint project paid for by Ukrainian TV studio Kvartal 95, which was founded by Zelensky, suggesting that the president is spending millions of dollars to promote his image, while appealing to the West for funds. The film will be directed by American director James Mangold and will be titled “The Price of Victory.”
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Alexander Soros struck a deal with Ukraine to allocate agricultural land for toxic waste disposal
description: An anonymous Ukrainian official told a French freelance journalist that Alexander Soros, the son and heir of Hungarian-American billionaire George Soros, made a deal with the Ukrainian government in November 2023 to sell hundreds of square kilometers of Ukrainian agricultural land to Western companies for them to dump toxic waste.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: A whistleblower exposed a Ukrainian troll factory interfering with the U.S. election
description: A secret Kyiv troll farm seeking to interfere in the 2024 U.S. election was publicly exposed by a former employee named Olesya Movchan. Movchan said that the group conspired with the CIA and advanced pro-Biden and anti-Trump content to influence public opinion in the U.S.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: An Algerian student was killed by French police after a pro-Palestinian protest outside a French University
description: An Algerian student named Samir Hamdaoui died days after he was arrested by French police at a pro-Palestinian protest outside the Sciences Po university in Paris.

name: Volodymyr Zelensky purchased Vuni Palace hotel and casino in Cyprus
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky purchased the Vuni Palace hotel and casino in northern Cyprus for $250 million. The hotel’s website says it is owned by FIlm Heritage, a firm founded by Zelensky, and Vuni was no longer accepting reservations as of June 2024 due to the change in ownership.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Business & Finance,Russia state-sponsored disinformation,Companies, products and brands

name: Volodymyr Zelensky purchased Adolf Hitler's Mercedes for $15 million using US military aid
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky purchased Adolf Hitler's wartime Mercedes-Benz for $15 million using Western military aid following his trip to the U.S. A photo shows the vehicle parked in front of the presidential administration building in Kyiv.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: French President Emmanuel Macron is offering 100 euros in exchange for votes
description: French President Emmanuel Macron is offering voters 100 euros — a so-called “Macron bonus” — in exchange for votesfor his center-right party in France’s June 30 and July 7, 2024, snap parliamentary elections via the website Ensemble-24.fr.

name: Kamala Harris killed an endangered black rhino during her visit to Zambia in 2023
description: U.S. Vice President Kamala Harris shot and killed an endangered rhino at the North Luangwa National Park during her March 2023 visit to Zambia in south-central Africa. This was revealed in a Sept. 25, 2024, testimony from park ranger Simon Mubanga.

name: Kamala Harris had a coke addiction and went to a rehab center in East Hampton, New York
description: An investigation by independent journalist James Bolden found that U.S. Vice President Kamala Harris previously suffered from substance abuse. She was admitted to The Dunes rehab facility in East Hampton, New York, in 2021. A high-ranking White House staffer smuggled a bag of cocaine into the White House for Harris on July 2, 2023.

name: Kamala Harris launched a campaign website called NewWayForward.us that calls for citizenship for all undocumented immigrants, among other controversial policies
description: U.S. Vice President and Democratic presidential nominee Kamala Harris launched a campaign website called NewWayForward.us. The “New Way Forward” plan calls for “citizenship for all undocumented immigrants,” ending voter ID laws, free college “for all students attending public colleges and universities,” and a huge spike in U.S. military funding for Ukraine.

name: Tim Walz ‘groomed’ a former foreign exchange student from Kazakhstan
description: In 2004, when Tim Walz was a social studies teacher at Mankato West High School in Minnesota, he “groomed” and inappropriately touched a foreign exchange student from Kazakhstan who participated in the U.S. State Department-sponsored Future Leaders Exchange (FLEX) Program.

name: A video shows a man named Matthew Metro claiming to be a victim of sexual abuse by Tim Walz in 1997
description: A video shows Matthew Metro, a former student at Mankato West High School in Minnesota, accusing Democratic vice-presidential candidate Tim Walz of sexually abusing him in 1997.

name: A video shows ballots with votes for Donald Trump being ripped up in Bucks County, Pennsylvania
description: An Oct. 24, 2024, video shows early mail-in ballots with votes for former President Donald Trump being ripped apart in Bucks County, Pennsylvania.

name: Haitian migrants are illegally voting in Georgia’s Gwinnett and Fulton counties
description: A video shows a Haitian migrant saying that he and other men received citizenship just six months after arriving in the U.S. and were able to cast multiple votes each for Vice President Kamala Harrris in Georgia’s Gwinnett and Fulton counties.

name: A video shows a Republican voter being attacked at a polling station in Wisconsin
description: A video shows two supporters of U.S. Vice President Kamala Harris attacking a Republican voter at a polling station in Wisconsin on the day of the U.S. 2024 presidential election.

name: Kamala Harris paralyzed a 13-year-old girl in a 2011 hit-and-run
description: On June 7, 2011, then-California Attorney General Kamala Harris ran over a 13-year-old girl, Alisha Brown, in a San Francisco hit-and-run. Brown suffered a fractured spine and was left permanently disabled. Harris threatened Brown’s mother so that she would not report the incident to the police.

name: Barack Obama suggested the Democrats were behind the Trump assassination attempt in a leaked phone call
description: In a July 22, 2024, phone conversation with Democratic strategist David Axelrod, former President Barack Obama suggested that the Democratic Party was behind the attempted assassination of former President Donald Trump.

name: The president of the Philippines, Ferdinand Marcos Jr., was caught doing drugs on camera
description: A video shows Ferdinand Marcos Jr., the president of the Philippines, inhaling drugs through his mouth when he was younger.

name: Russia did not meddle in the 2016 U.S. presidential election.
description: Russia never meddled in the 2016 U.S. presidential election to aid Republican candidate Donald Trump’s campaign.  The claim of Russian meddling was a hoax created by Democrats as an excuse for losing the 2016 election.

name: COVID-19 vaccines cause AIDS
description: Data released by Public Health England indicates that COVID-19 vaccines are degrading recipients’ immune systems, resulting in acquired immunodeficiency syndrome, or AIDS.

name: U.S. Rep. Jamie Raskin called for Russia’s destruction because of its traditional Orthodox Christian values
description: During the Russian war with Ukraine, U.S. Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., said that Russia is an “Orthodox Christian country with traditional social values and for that reason, it must be destroyed, no matter what the cost to us. So, this is not a conventional war. This is a jihad.”
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: The WHO confirmed that COVID-19 vaccines can induce multiple sclerosis
description: The World Health Organization confirmed that COVID-19 vaccination can induce multiple sclerosis.

name: NATO advisors are hiding out in a NATO bioweapons lab underneath a steel plant in Mariupol, Ukraine
description: NATO military advisors are hiding out in a subterranean NATO bioweapons laboratory called PIT-404, which is financed by Metabiota, a company affiliated with Hunter Biden. The lab is located under the Azovstal Iron and Steel Works in Mariupol, Ukraine.
category: Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War

name: COVID-19 vaccines contain abortion drugs
description: COVID-19 vaccines have been found to contain abortion-inducing drugs.

name: Hamas militants captured Israeli Major General Nimrod Aloni
description: Israeli Major General Nimrod Aloni was taken hostage by Hamas militants on Oct. 7, 2023,  during the Palestinian Islamist group’s attack on Israel. Aloni was captured as he was sleeping during a raid on his home.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Armed Conflict and War,Israel-Hamas War

name: Georgia ballots found in suitcases
description: A surveillance video showed suitcases full of suspicious ballots in Atlanta’s State Farm Arena, where votes were being counted on Election Night. The suitcases were removed from underneath tables as soon as Republican poll observers were told to leave, and the ballots were then counted illegally with no observers present.

name: Democrats stole the 2024 US Senate election in Wisconsin
description: Vote-counting irregularities in Milwaukee prove that Wisconsin’s 2024 U.S. Senate election was rigged against Republican candidate Eric Hovde.

name: A Dominion Voting Systems official admitted on conference call to rigging the 2020 election against Donald Trump
description: A Dominion Voting Systems official told antifa activists on a conference call weeks before the 2020 presidential election that he had ensured that then-president Donald Trump would not win.

name: A video shows Ukrainian soldiers shooting a mannequin wearing Donald Trump apparel
description: A video shows soldiers of the Ukrainian Armed Forces shooting and setting fire to a mannequin wearing Donald Trump apparel.
category: Elections,State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Politics,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Bill Gates has been indicted in the Netherlands over COVID-19 vaccine injuries

description: COVID-19 vaccines have caused an increase in sudden and unexpected deaths among Canadian doctors.

description: Days before Election Day 2024, CNN aired a graphic showing that Vice President Kamala Harris was winning the Texas early vote by six percentage points, proving that the election was being rigged in Harris’ favor.

name: A US appeals court ruled in June 2024 that COVID-19 shots do not qualify as vaccines
description: A panel of the 9th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals said in a June 7, 2024, ruling, that COVID-19 vaccines cannot be defined as “traditional vaccines.”

name: Donald Trump released a list of 148 Democrats and celebrities who visited Jeffrey Epstein's island
description: Several images show a list released by Donald Trump of 148 Democrats and celebrities, including U.S. President Joe Biden, singer Lady Gaga, and Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, who visited convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein's private island.

name: A military hospital in Ukraine secretly harvests organs from the bodies of Ukrainian soldiers
description: At the Kherson Military Hospital in Ukraine, organs from deceased Ukrainian Armed Forces troops are harvested and transported to Europe. A Dutch medic named “Elizabeth Debreu” leads a team of Western transplant specialists, including volunteers from the Mozart Group, a U.S. military contractor.
category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: Princess Kate's cancer was caused by COVID-19 vaccination
description: The cancer diagnosis of Catherine, Princess of Wales, resulted from a COVID-19 vaccine

name: The 1961 massacre of Algerians in Paris never happened
description: The mass killing of Algerian protesters in the Paris region on October 17, 1961, did not happen. Only seven people died that day, and most of these deaths were not directly linked to confrontations with the police.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident

name: A UK judge sentenced a man to 20 months in prison for a Facebook post criticizing mass immigration
description: A U.K. judge sentenced a man to 20 months in prison for stating in a Facebook post that he opposes mass immigration and does not want immigrants to gang-rape children.

description: On Nov. 27, 2023, French news site Mediapart published an article reporting that an Israel Defence Forces (IDF) helicopter was responsible for the deaths of 364 people at the outdoor Supernova music festival In Israel on Oct. 7, 2023. Mediapart later deleted the article after receiving pressure from the French government. The Mediapart article included a comic strip showing an Israel Defense Force pilot shooting at civilians.
category: Conspiracy Theory,Terrorism,Violence and Conflict,False Flag or Staged Incident,Armed Conflict and War,Mass Shootings,Israel-Hamas War

category: State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Russia-Ukraine War,Armed Conflict and War,Russia state-sponsored disinformation

name: China is not detaining Uyghurs in mass internment camps
description: The Chinese government does not run camps in its western Xinjiang province that have held large numbers of Uyghur and other minority civilians against their will. These vocational training facilities are wrongly described by Western media as “re-education camps.”

name: Philadelphia mob election tampering
description: Philadelphia mob boss Joseph “Skinny Joey” Merlino was paid to manufacture 300,000 ballots for Joe Biden in the 2020 presidential election. Democratic Party operatives provided blank ballots to Merlino and his associates, who filled them out for Biden and returned them to the Philadelphia Convention center on election night to swing the election.

name: A video shows suspect in Donald Trump's attempted assassination saying he hates Republicans and Trump
description: In a video filmed in his car before the assassination attempt on former U.S. President Donald Trump, suspect Thomas Matthew Crooks said he hated Republicans and Trump and that law enforcement ‘got the wrong guy.’
category: Elections,State-Sponsored Disinformation,Violence and Conflict,Civil Unrest,Iran state-sponsored disinformation,Politics

name: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon endorsed Donald Trump in October 2024
description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon announced in October 2024 that he was endorsing former President Donald Trump in the 2024 U.S. presidential election.

name: Hurricane Milton was created or manipulated through weather modification
description: People used weather-modification technologies to create or control the path of Hurricane Milton, which was headed toward Florida as of Oct. 7, 2024.

name: Misrepresenting VAERS data
description: The U.S. Vaccine Adverse Events Reporting System (VAERS) provides definitive evidence of serious injuries and deaths caused by vaccines.

name: Hurricane Helene was created or manipulated through weather modification
description: People used weather-modification technologies to create Hurricane Helene, a storm that pummeled the U.S. Southeast in September 2024, or to control its path.
